In December 2021, four Neo4j engineers, together with MaruthiIn December 2021, four Neo4j engineers, together with Maruthi
and I, developed a medical chatbot called Doctor.ai in theand I, developed a medical chatbot called Doctor.ai in the
Singapore Healthcare AI Datathon & EXPO 2021. Doctor.aiSingapore Healthcare AI Datathon & EXPO 2021. Doctor.ai
manages electronic health records in a Neo4j graph andmanages electronic health records in a Neo4j graph and
interacts with its users in English thanks to AWS Lex.interacts with its users in English thanks to AWS Lex.
After the Datathon, we have continued to expand Doctor.ai.After the Datathon, we have continued to expand Doctor.ai.
After the integration of three public knowledge graphs, Doctor.aiAfter the integration of three public knowledge graphs, Doctor.ai
knows about diseases, genes, pharmaceutical compounds,knows about diseases, genes, pharmaceutical compounds,
symptoms and so on. This expansion connects patients’healthsymptoms and so on. This expansion connects patients’health
records to the medical knowledge network. In other words, itrecords to the medical knowledge network. In other words, it
connects the speciﬁc to the general. Now we can understandconnects the speciﬁc to the general. Now we can understand
each patient’s medical history in a much broader context. Foreach patient’s medical history in a much broader context. For
example, after we ask for a patient’s last diagnosis, we can askexample, after we ask for a patient’s last diagnosis, we can ask
further what caused the disease and which drugs can be used.further what caused the disease and which drugs can be used.

What is 4chan?

4chan is a simple image-based bulletin board where anyone can post comments and share images. There are boards dedicated to a variety of topics, from Japanese animation and culture to videogames, music, and photography. Users do not need to register an account before participating in the community. Feel free to click on a board below that interests you and jump right in!


Be sure to familiarize yourself with the Rules before posting, and read the FAQ if you wish to learn more about how to use the site.
